Personal Information

Education History

Tell us about your educational background

High School Information

College/University Information

Have you attended any colleges or universities?

Military Background

APUS is proud to serve military members, veterans, and their families. Please share your military background information below.

Optional - Enter your current or highest rank achieved
Leave blank if currently serving
Optional - Your Military Occupational Specialty

Why we ask:

This information helps us better serve military-affiliated students and connect you with appropriate benefits and resources. All information is confidential and used solely for educational purposes.

Required Documents

Upload your supporting documents

Official Transcripts *

Upload official transcripts from all high schools and colleges attended. Transcripts must be official and include a signature or seal.

Click to upload or drag and drop

PDF, JPG, or PNG (Max 10MB)

Note: Your application will remain incomplete until official transcripts are received. You can upload them through your applicant portal after submission.

Government-Issued Photo ID *

Upload a copy of your driver's license, state ID, or passport.

Click to upload or drag and drop

PDF, JPG, or PNG (Max 5MB)

Additional Documents (Optional)

Upload any additional supporting documents such as letters of recommendation, resume, or military records.

Click to upload or drag and drop

PDF, JPG, PNG, or DOCX (Max 10MB)

Review Your Application

Please review all information before submitting

Application Fee: A non-refundable application fee of $50 will be charged upon submission.

Application Submitted Successfully!

Thank you for applying to American Public University System

Application Details

Application ID

APP-2025-000123

Submission Date

-

Program Applied

-

Start Term

-

What Happens Next?

Confirmation Email

You will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours with your application details and next steps.

Application Review

Our admissions team will review your application within 2-3 business days.

Admission Decision

You'll receive your admission decision via email within 5-7 business days.

Enrollment

If accepted, you'll receive enrollment instructions and can begin registering for classes.

Important Information

  • Check your email regularly for updates on your application status
  • You can track your application status by logging into your applicant portal
  • If you have questions, contact our admissions office at 1-877-468-6268 or admissions@apus.edu
  • Application fee payment confirmation will be sent to your email
Return to Dashboard

Save Your Progress?

Your selected courses and registration progress will be saved to your cart.

You can resume your registration anytime by clicking the cart icon in the top navigation.
